text: Standing outside the glass doors, I feel anticipation. The clean lines and subdued buzz of light hint at a thoughtful, intentional space within—perhaps a gallery or innovation lab. As I step through and see the bold "R + D" sign, colors, and interactive displays, curiosity stirs within me. The text on the wall encourages a sense of wonder, making me feel both invited and participatory, as though my presence here matters and my mind is being gently urged into action. The environment inspires reflective excitement, a prelude to creative discovery.
